title: Master of Philosophy Program Application and Fees
content:
Master of Philosophy Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

The Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

THERE WILL BE NO SCIENTIFIC EXAM FOR THE 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER STUDENT ADMISSION FOR THE MASTER'S PROGRAM WITH THESIS IN PHILOSOPHY.

Candidates must have taken the ALES exam and scored at least 55 points in the EA score type in order to apply to the thesis program.

In Master's Programs with Thesis, 65% of ALES and 35% of undergraduate graduation grade point average in the relevant score type will be taken into consideration for the acceptance.

The applications of candidates, who do not apply online, who are not graduated at the time of application, who do not upload the ALES document for the last 5 years for the thesis program and the document showing the undergraduate graduation grade point average during the application will be invalid.

Classes in this program are held in the evening hours on weekdays.
